# ozDNA

> Horizontal LLM gateways optimize calls. ozDNA optimizes vertical AI business economics — cost per workflow, production RAG, tokenomics, and margin resilience for vertical AI teams. Findbelow Ventures · ozdna.com

Private beta. Early access invite only. English site; Turkish planned.

## Knowledge bundle (markdown)

Structured content for agents — prefer these files over scraping.

- [Index / manifest](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/_index.md): All pages and relations
- [Platform overview](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/overview.md): Positioning, OzDNA GPT, five pillars
- [Phase 2 model strategy](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/model-strategy.md): Own-model path, TezMakale API cost levers, budget, B2G/B2B co-investment tiers
- [Ecosystem](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/ecosystem.md): TezMakale, Academic, Comply
- [Integration](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/integration.md): Auth, workflows, error codes
- [Pricing](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/pricing.md): Early access / enterprise
- [Contact](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/contact.md): Waitlist, hello@ozdna.com
- [API overview](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/api-overview.md): Base URL, endpoints (Phase 2)
- [Detect API](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/api-detect.md): POST /v1/detect (vertical workloads)
- [Humanize API](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/api-humanize.md): POST /v1/humanize
- [Auth](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/api-auth.md): Bearer token
- [Vertical modes](https://ozdna.com/knowledge/vertical-modes.md): academic, legal, financial

## Web

- [Homepage](https://ozdna.com/): B2B infrastructure landing, five pillars, waitlist
- [Blog](https://ozdna.com/blog/): Problem-aware founder content (GPU Bill Bodyguard series)
- [API docs](https://ozdna.com/docs/): Phase 2 preview

## Blog (GPU Bill Bodyguard series)

### Long-tail guides
- [How to Reduce LLM API Costs](https://ozdna.com/blog/how-to-reduce-llm-api-costs/)
- [Production RAG Best Practices](https://ozdna.com/blog/production-rag-best-practices/)
- [Tracking LLM Cost Per Request](https://ozdna.com/blog/tracking-llm-cost-per-request/)
- [Why RAG Fails in Production](https://ozdna.com/blog/why-rag-fails-in-production/)
- [Token Economics for AI SaaS](https://ozdna.com/blog/token-economics-for-ai-saas/)
- [Choosing the Cheapest Capable LLM](https://ozdna.com/blog/choosing-cheapest-capable-llm/)
- [Protecting Gross Margin in AI SaaS](https://ozdna.com/blog/protecting-gross-margin-ai-saas/)
- [Model Routing for Cost Efficiency](https://ozdna.com/blog/model-routing-cost-efficiency/)

### Problem-aware

- [When Every Active User Destroys Your Margin](https://ozdna.com/blog/when-every-active-user-destroys-your-margin/): AI API bills vs revenue
- [Making Inference Cost Measurable and Routable](https://ozdna.com/blog/making-inference-cost-measurable-and-routable/): GPU/API cost attribution
- [Vertical AI vs. Thin Wrapper](https://ozdna.com/blog/vertical-ai-vs-thin-wrapper/): Investor diligence lens
- [Hidden Platform Risk: API Pricing](https://ozdna.com/blog/hidden-platform-risk-api-pricing/): LLM pricing risk

## Built on ozDNA (production proof)

- [TezMakale](https://tezmakale.com): Live TR academic AI on ozDNA stack
- OzDNA Comply: RegTech layer (Phase 2)

## Brand positioning

- **Tagline:** Horizontal LLM gateways optimize calls. ozDNA optimizes vertical AI business economics.
- **Unit of value:** Workflow / outcome / margin — not request / call / token alone
- **Relationship to gateways:** Complementary layer above LiteLLM, Portkey, Helicone — not a replacement

## SEO / content strategy

- Primary keywords: vertical AI business economics, LLM cost optimization, AI cost optimization platform, vertical AI infrastructure, production RAG, token cost management
- Traffic strategy: long-tail problem-aware blog content (see internal SEO plan)

- [llms-full.txt](https://ozdna.com/llms-full.txt): Full knowledge bundle in one file
